svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(34, 197, 94), rgb(0, 140, 52));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #14532D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#14532D, #8cc2a2); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 243, 199), rgb(39, 30, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(245, 158, 11), rgb(162, 87, 0));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));
